016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonCreator;
019import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnoreProperties;
020import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;
021
022/**
023 * POJO for `getnetworkinfo` RPC response.
024 * Warning: `network` and `address` will be upgraded to POJOs in the future
025 */
026public class NetworkInfo {
027    private final int version;
028    private final String subVersion;
029    private final int protocolVersion;
030    private final int timeOffset;
031    private final int connections;
032    private final String proxy;
033    private final int relayFee;
034    private final byte[] localServices;
035    private final Object[]  network;
036    private final Object[]  address;
037
038    @JsonCreator
039    public NetworkInfo(@JsonProperty("version")         int version,
040                       @JsonProperty("subversion")      String subVersion,
041                       @JsonProperty("protocolversion") int protocolVersion,
042                       @JsonProperty("timeOffset")      int timeOffset,
043                       @JsonProperty("connections")     int connections,
044                       @JsonProperty("proxy")           String proxy,
045                       @JsonProperty("relayFee")        int relayFee,
046                       @JsonProperty("localServices")   byte[] localServices,
047                       @JsonProperty("network")         Object[] network,
048                       @JsonProperty("address")         Object[] address) {
049        this.version = version;
050        this.subVersion = subVersion;
051        this.protocolVersion = protocolVersion;
052        this.timeOffset = timeOffset;
053        this.connections = connections;
054        this.proxy = proxy;
055        this.relayFee = relayFee;
056        this.localServices = localServices;
057        this.network = network;
058        this.address = address;
059    }
060
061    public int getVersion() {
062        return version;
063    }
064
065    public String getSubVersion() {
066        return subVersion;
067    }
068
069    public int getProtocolVersion() {
070        return protocolVersion;
071    }
072
073    public int getTimeOffset() {
074        return timeOffset;
075    }
076
077    public int getConnections() {
078        return connections;
079    }
080
081    public String getProxy() {
082        return proxy;
083    }
084
085    public int getRelayFee() {
086        return relayFee;
087    }
088
089    public byte[] getLocalServices() {
090        return localServices;
091    }
092
093    public Object[] getNetwork() {
094        return network;
095    }
096
097    public Object[] getAddress() {
098        return address;
099    }
100}
